title: ferray-linalg: no diagonal() or matrix_transpose() functions
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy 2.0's linalg module includes np.linalg.diagonal(x, offset=0) and np.linalg.matrix_transpose(x) as part of the Array API standard. ferray-linalg has trace() (which sums the diagonal) but no function to extract the diagonal itself. matrix_transpose could be a zero-copy view operation. These are listed in numpy.linalg.__all__ and are part of the array API standard compliance.
